commodities.name: Food & Water
commodities.description: Ration packs and recycled water. Every station needs it, nobody wants to pay for it, and the haulers who deliver it don't get thanked.

commodities.name: Textiles
commodities.description: Fabrics and clothing from Verdant's looms. The weavers take pride in the work. The Guild takes a cut of the price.

commodities.name: Common Metals
commodities.description: Iron, copper, and aluminum pulled from deep-core mines. The refining is automated. The extraction isn't.

commodities.name: Fuel Cells
commodities.description: Hydrogen fuel cells. The price fluctuates by the hour. Your ability to leave a station doesn't.

commodities.name: Machinery
commodities.description: Fabrication presses, drill assemblies, automated lathes. The machines that build everything else. Breakstone runs through them faster than the budget allows.

commodities.name: Electronics
commodities.description: Processors, sensors, comm arrays. Half the sector runs on electronics three generations out of date. The other half can't afford the current ones.

commodities.name: Rare Metals
commodities.description: Platinum, titanium, and rare earth elements. Extracted at considerable personal risk by contract miners in Iron Depths. The price doesn't reflect the cost.

commodities.name: Manufactured Goods
commodities.description: Tools, appliances, replacement parts. The things that keep stations livable. Forgeworks stamps each crate. The workers who built the contents don't get a label.

commodities.name: Precious Metals
commodities.description: Gold, silver, and platinum. Stellaris Port trades it as investment. The miners who pulled it from rock see none of the appreciation.

commodities.name: Art & Antiquities
commodities.description: Pre-Expansion ceramics, commissioned portraits, salvaged cultural relics. Worth a fortune to collectors. Worth more to the communities they were taken from.

commodities.name: Exotic Goods
commodities.description: Unclassified specimens, anomalous materials, things pulled from places nobody should have been. The provenance is always vague. The buyers don't ask.
commodities.description_note: Extremely volatile but potentially very profitable.

commodities.name: Medical Supplies
commodities.description: Pharmaceuticals, surgical equipment, bio-tech compounds. Stations that can't afford them ration what they have. Stations that can afford them buy more than they need.

commodities.name: Raw Ore
commodities.description: Unrefined rock and mineral aggregate. Cheap by the ton, valuable in volume. The margins are thin. The shifts aren't.

commodities.name: Iron Ore
commodities.description: Iron-rich ore from the deep shafts. The smelters need it yesterday. The miners' lungs remember the dust long after the crates leave the bay.

commodities.name: Crystal Ore
commodities.description: Crystalline mineral deposits with refractive properties essential for optics and sensors. Breakstone's main export. The price spikes every time Axiom Labs publishes a new paper.

commodities.name: Rare Ore
commodities.description: Scarce mineral deposits laced with exotic elements. One crate is worth a month's wages at Iron Depths. The miners who find it get a bonus. The miners who don't find it get the same shift tomorrow.

commodities.name: Scrap Metal
commodities.description: Metal fragments stripped from derelicts and wrecks. Every piece had a hull number once. Every hull number had a crew.

commodities.name: Salvaged Electronics
commodities.description: Circuit boards and processors pried from dead ships. Cleaned up, tested, resold. The previous owners aren't in a position to object.

commodities.name: Rare Parts
commodities.description: Components from military-grade wreckage. Scarce, valuable, and nobody asks how the ship they came from ended up as wreckage.

commodities.name: Alloy Composite
commodities.description: High-strength alloy forged at Forgeworks. Ship hulls, station bulkheads, blast doors. The stuff that stands between people and vacuum. Quality varies with the shift.

commodities.name: Purified Crystal
commodities.description: Crystal refined to molecular precision. Sensor arrays, energy focusers, weapons optics. Worth more per gram than most people earn in a week. Handle accordingly.

commodities.name: Weapons Components
commodities.description: Targeting arrays, barrel assemblies, firing mechanisms. Restricted by every faction that can afford to enforce it. Available everywhere that can't.

commodities.name: Restricted Tech
commodities.description: Dual-use tech the Collective developed for research and the military repurposed for killing. Permits required. Permits available, for a price.

commodities.name: Stolen Data
commodities.description: Encrypted files somebody paid to acquire and somebody else paid more to suppress. Corporate secrets, research data, personnel records. The contents don't matter. The leverage does.

commodities.name: Combat Stimulants
commodities.description: Performance enhancers banned by every medical board in the sector. Demand stays high in the mines and the combat zones — places where being tired gets you killed.

commodities.name: Diverted Medicine
commodities.description: Legitimate medicine diverted from Guild distribution. Same pills, different paperwork. The stations buying it can't afford the markup. The Guild calls it theft. The patients call it survival.

commodities.name: Encrypted Data Chip
commodities.description: A military-grade encrypted data chip intercepted by Dex Halloran. Contains information about organized convoy raids.

commodities.name: Flux Catalyst
commodities.description: A volatile reagent that accelerates molecular bonding in forge processes. Consumed on use.

commodities.name: Charged Filament
commodities.description: Conductive thread saturated with residual energy. Used in precision assembly work.

commodities.name: Combat Salvage
commodities.description: Armor fragments and weapon housings stripped from defeated ships. Still warm.

commodities.name: Anomalous Sample
commodities.description: An unclassified material recovered from deep-space anomalies. Handling protocols recommended.

commodities.name: Resonance Core
commodities.description: A crystalline lattice that hums at frequencies outside standard instrumentation range.

commodities.name: Signal Fragment
commodities.description: Encoded data shards recovered from derelict nav-buoys. Useful in scanner calibration.

commodities.name: Reinforced Plating Schematic
commodities.description: A forged armor composite ready for installation. Trades hull flexibility for raw stopping power.

commodities.name: Overclocked Scanner Assembly
commodities.description: A hand-tuned sensor package that pushes well past factory specifications.

commodities.name: Plasma Conduit Module
commodities.description: A high-throughput energy relay forged from purified crystal and rare catalysts.

commodities.name: Thermal Visor Kit
commodities.description: Ground exploration optics that reveal heat signatures through walls and terrain.

commodities.name: Breaching Charge Pack
commodities.description: Compact shaped charges built for clearing sealed bulkheads during ground operations.

commodities.name: Stellarium Ingot
commodities.description: A dense, iridescent metal synthesized from rare ores and catalytic compounds. Traders covet it. Stations fight over supply contracts.

commodities.name: Titan Plating Module
commodities.description: Multi-layered hull plating fused with plasma conduits and stellarium. The pinnacle of defensive crafting.

commodities.name: Command Array Module
commodities.description: A unified sensor and targeting suite combining overclocked scanners with thermal optics.

commodities.name: Nova Core Module
commodities.description: A devastating energy weapon core built around twin resonance chambers and stellarium reinforcement.

commodities.name: Adrenal Compound Injector
commodities.description: A pressurized injector loaded with refined combat stimulants. Grants a burst of speed and focus during ground operations.

commodities.name: Phantom Module
commodities.description: An active countermeasure suite that spoofs scanner returns. Makes the ship harder to detect and target.

commodities.name: Fortified Stimulants
commodities.description: Military-grade stimulants catalyzed with exotic compounds. Banned in every jurisdiction, coveted in every combat zone.

commodities.name: Phase Lattice
commodities.description: A resonant crystalline matrix stabilized under catalytic pressure. Used in precision sensor and weapon systems.

commodities.name: Refined Propellant
commodities.description: High-yield hydrogen compound compressed for use in thruster arrays. Station managers buy it in bulk.

commodities.name: Neural Weave
commodities.description: Bio-synthetic fiber threaded with encoded signal patterns. Sold as cognitive enhancement substrate.

commodities.name: Arc Emitter Assembly
commodities.description: A directed-energy weapon assembly built around a phase lattice core. Effective against shielded targets.

commodities.name: EMP Grenade Pack
commodities.description: Compact electromagnetic pulse devices. Disables electronics in the blast radius.

commodities.name: Shield Capacitor Array
commodities.description: A high-density capacitor array that stores and releases shield energy for burst absorption.

commodities.name: Deep Scan Probe
commodities.description: A single-use mineral survey probe calibrated for deep-layer geological mapping.

commodities.name: Black Market Serum
commodities.description: An unlabeled injector of indeterminate origin. High demand in the right circles.

commodities.name: Schematic Data
commodities.description: Fragmentary blueprints recovered from salvaged hardware. Enough of these can reconstruct a complete manufacturing process.

commodities.name: Resonant Drill Array
commodities.description: A tuned alloy drill head that vibrates at harmonic frequencies to shatter rock faster.

commodities.name: Seismic Bore Engine
commodities.description: A massive resonance-powered boring machine that can crack through the densest asteroid cores.

commodities.name: Precision Extractor Array
commodities.description: A calibrated salvage arm with enhanced grip servos and yield-maximizing extraction protocols.

commodities.name: Quantum Salvage Suite
commodities.description: Integrates phase-shifted sensors with deep-field extractors for unmatched salvage throughput.

commodities.name: Catalyst Forge Module
commodities.description: An auxiliary forge chamber lined with catalytic alloy. Improves refining output consistency.

commodities.name: Stellarium Crucible
commodities.description: A stellarium-lined crucible that maintains perfect thermal equilibrium during synthesis.
